nasb.text: So they passed along and went their way, and the sun set on them near Gibeah which belongs to Benjamin.

esv.text: So they passed on and went their way. And the sun went down on them near Gibeah, which belongs to Benjamin,

cnv.text: 於是他們走路過去；他們走近便雅憫人的基比亞的時候，日頭已經落了。

ccb.text: 于是，他们继续前行，到便雅悯境内的基比亚时，天已经黑了。
